provides.name: SearchForm
provides.summary: Flight search form: trip-type toggle, origin/destination airport autocomplete, depart/return date pickers, cabin and passenger fields with client-side validation.

provides.name: ResultsList
provides.summary: Selectable, sortable (best/cheapest/fastest) list of flight results with price, duration, stops, and deal-level badges.

provides.name: LegTimeline
provides.summary: Vertical itinerary timeline rendering each flight leg and layover with airline, aircraft, durations, and tight/long-connection warnings.

provides.name: AirlineCard
provides.summary: Airline-experience card that lazy-fetches and displays curated comfort data (seat pitch, bag fees, Wi-Fi, power) for an airline code.

provides.name: AirportAutocomplete
provides.summary: Domain wrapper over the shared Autocomplete that queries /api/airports and reports the selected IATA code (or typed text) upward.

provides.name: globeData
provides.summary: Maps FlightResult itineraries into the generic GeoGlobe {arcs,points} shape (outbound sky-blue, return amber), isolating FlightResult coupling from the shared globe.

provides.name: booking
provides.summary: Builds pre-filled booking deep links to Google Flights and Kayak from a route/date/cabin/passenger query.

provides.name: api
provides.summary: Typed client for the Flight Scanner backend: airport search, flight search, and airline-card endpoints plus the shared FlightResult/Leg/SearchParams types.

notes.geo-globe: Consumed via the `pandora-components-web/globe` subpath (separate so non-globe apps don't pull three/react-globe.gl — both declared as optional peers). flight-scanner's GeoGlobe was promoted as the canonical unified globe; lib/globeData.ts maps FlightResult -> {arcs,points}. Observability global: window.__geoGlobeMarkers.
notes.catalog: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/components?token=$(cat ~/.config/pandora/serve.token); all consumed ids verified promoted. App OWNED components (search/results/timeline/airline card/airport autocomplete + lib mappers + api client) are catalogued in provides[]; everything else (Button/Card/Badge/Spinner/EmptyState/PageShell/DatePicker/SegmentedControl/form fields/Autocomplete/Toast/GeoGlobe) is consumed from the shared library.
notes.dedup: No app component re-implements a shared one. AirportAutocomplete is a thin domain wrapper over shared Autocomplete (airport API -> options), not a reimplementation. The shared/ dir holds only promoted-component tests.
